title: perezia squarrosa
intro: Perezia squarrosa is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae, commonly known as the daisy or sunflower family. It is native to the Andes mountain range in South America, where it grows in high-altitude regions. Perezia squarrosa has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, and is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems. The plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its health benefits include reducing inflammation, boosting the immune system, and promoting overall well-being.
